scenarios.name: Normal Event Flow
scenarios.description: Standard event conditions. All gates open, moderate crowd, Poisson arrivals.

scenarios.name: Peak Hour Congestion
scenarios.description: High visitor density concentrated in a short window. Tests peak load capacity.

scenarios.name: Gate Failure
scenarios.description: Gate B fails at the start. Only 3 gates handle all traffic. Tests redistribution.

scenarios.name: Security Delay
scenarios.description: Security processing takes 3x longer at all gates. Tests queue buildup.

scenarios.name: Emergency Evacuation
scenarios.description: Normal flow for 200s, then emergency triggers. All visitors evacuate.
